claim_boundary: Regulatory Phase 6 audits and closes the regulatory readiness scaffold only. It does not claim certification, compliance, government approval, procurement approval, legal sufficiency, financial/tax approval, production monitoring, professional audit, or truth validation.
largest_gaps_preserved: No formal certification or conformity assessment exists.
No ISO/IEC 42001 or equivalent management-system audit exists.
No formal security questionnaire/access-control packet exists.
No adopted lawyer-reviewed policies or customer contract terms exist.
No professional compliance, tax, accounting, valuation, or legal opinion exists.
safe_overall_claim: SpecShift has a completed internal regulatory, certification, and procurement readiness scaffold. It organizes evidence, governance policies, procurement packet indexes, and gap analysis for future professional/procurement review. It is not certification, compliance, government approval, procurement approval, legal sufficiency, financial/tax approval, production monitoring, or truth validation.
